message:
🐛 Fix Pod Brothers game stuck on Game Over after Try Again (#2713)

The player spawn position (col 1, row 7) overlaps with an enemy
at the same tile. On each new game/respawn, the player takes
damage on the very first frame — losing all 3 lives in ~50ms
before any input is possible.

Add spawn invincibility (90 frames / ~1.5s) so the player is
immune to enemy contact damage after starting or respawning.
The player blinks during invincibility for visual feedback.
Stomping enemies is still allowed during invincibility.

Fixes #2696

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
